validValues.label: Show Different Content (In Role / Out of Role)
Show Only When Out of Role

fields.description: Comma-separated role names (e.g. "Administrator, Power User"). Content shows only if the user has at least one of these roles. Defaults to "User", which every signed-in user has — effectively a signed-in check. Inherited roles are included.
fields.label: Required Roles
fields.name: roles
